extDescription.message: Batch export Yuque knowledge bases to Markdown/HTML with images and attachments. Supports incremental export, collaboration repos, and scheduled backup.

welcomeTip1.message: Please log in to Yuque first

welcomeTip2.message: Select repos and click 🔍 to get info

sponsorModalDesc.message: If this tool helps you, a small donation is welcome.

sponsorTip.message: Scan QR code, any amount appreciated!

notLoggedIn.message: Not logged in. Please log in to Yuque first.

pleaseSelectBooks.message: Please select at least one knowledge base

clickToLoginYuque.message: Click to log in to Yuque

subfolderDesc.message: Files will be saved under this subfolder in Downloads.

downloadImagesDesc.message: Auto-download images to assets/ and replace with local paths.

downloadAttachmentsDesc.message: Download attachments (PDF, Word, etc.) to attachments/.

incrementalExportDesc.message: Only export new/modified documents since last export.

requestIntervalDesc.message: Delay between requests to avoid rate limiting. 500-2000ms recommended.

imageConcurrencyDesc.message: Number of concurrent image downloads. 1-5 recommended.

aboutDesc.message: Zero-config batch export tool for Yuque knowledge bases

settingsAuthTip.message: Authentication: Just stay logged in to yuque.com — the extension reads cookies automatically. No token configuration needed.

disclaimer1.message: This extension is an independent open-source project, not affiliated with Yuque (yuque.com) in any way.

disclaimer2.message: Only for exporting and backing up content you have authorized access to. Do not use for unauthorized data collection.

disclaimer3.message: Exported content copyright belongs to the original authors. Users must comply with applicable laws and Yuque's terms of service.

disclaimer4.message: The author is not liable for any data loss, account risk, or other damages caused by using this tool.

disclaimer5.message: This tool does not collect, store, or upload any user data. All processing is done locally in your browser.

aboutProjectDesc1.message: YuqueOut is a Chrome extension built for Yuque users to batch export knowledge base content with one click. Whether migrating personal notes to Obsidian or backing up team knowledge bases, YuqueOut makes it easy.

aboutProjectDesc2.message: All data processing is done locally — no data is collected or uploaded.

featureBooksDesc.message: Auto-fetch personal + collaboration repos with multi-select batch export

featureFormatsDesc.message: Markdown (with Front Matter) and HTML formats, preserving full directory structure

featureImagesDesc.message: Auto-download Yuque CDN images, handle hotlink protection, replace with local paths

featureAttachmentsDesc.message: Download embedded PDFs, Word docs, and other attachments

featureIncrementalDesc.message: Track export history, only process new/modified docs, saving time

featureBackupDesc.message: Set daily/weekly/monthly auto incremental backups for data safety

featureCollabDesc.message: Export all collaboration repos and team space documents you have access to

featurePrivacyDesc.message: Pure local processing, zero data upload, no passwords or tokens stored

contactDesc.message: If you encounter issues or have suggestions, feel free to reach out:

adsSponsorDesc.message: If YuqueOut helps you, consider buying me a coffee! Your support keeps this project going.

settingsDocFormatDesc.message: Default export format for Yuque 'Doc' type documents.

settingsSheetFormatDesc.message: Export format for Yuque 'Sheet' and 'Table' types.

formatHint.message: Smart export: Doc→Markdown · Sheet/Table→Excel · Board→JPG (customizable in settings)
